name: vimeo-plugin
description: Standalone single-plugin marketplace for the Vimeo plugin. Pushes Descript exports from Google Drive into the iDD Vimeo library - multi-language captions, metadata sync, and gated source replacement.

plugins.name: vimeo
plugins.description: Push Descript exports from Google Drive into the existing Vimeo library. Activates for: (1) syncing multi-language captions to Vimeo videos, (2) updating Vimeo title and description, (3) replacing a Vimeo source file, (4) reconciling a Drive-to-Vimeo manifest.
